name: copilot-chat-gui
description: Modern Chat GUI powered by GitHub Copilot SDK — Claude/ChatGPT-like interface for GitHub Copilot

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build -w client && npm run dev -w desktop
scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server && npm run build:win -w desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run sync:chat-error-code-dts && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p client/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p desktop/tsconfig.json

author: yamapan
